<div align="center"><img src="https://files.catbox.moe/olz8o7.png" width="900"/>🎧 BIHAR KE BAHUBALI MUSIC BOT

Telegram Voice Chat Music Streaming Bot

<img src="https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&color=yellow"/>
<img src="https://img.shields.io/github/forks/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot?style=for-the-badge&logo=github"/>
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.9+-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=python"/>
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Telegram-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=telegram"/></div>---

⚡ What This Bot Does

Stream music and video directly in Telegram voice chats.

Just type:

/play song name

And the bot will start playing music in your group voice chat.

---

🔥 Features

- 🎧 High Quality Music Streaming
- 🎬 Video Playback Support
- ⚡ Fast Queue System
- 🌍 Play Music From Multiple Platforms
- 👮 Admin Control Commands

---

🚀 Quick Installation

Clone the repository

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

Enter the folder

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

Install requirements

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

Run the bot

bash start

---

🎛 Commands

Command| Action
/play| Play music
/vplay| Play video
/pause| Pause
/resume| Resume
/skip| Skip
/stop| Stop music

---

<div align="center">⭐ If you like the project, give it a star

</div>rents project isn't built just to play songs.

It is designed to deliver:

⚡ Low latency streaming
🎧 High quality audio
🎬 Video playback support
📜 Smart queue system
🌍 Multi platform music extraction
👮 Admin control system

All running inside Telegram voice chats.

---

⚙ Technology Behind The System

This bot is powered by modern technologies:

- Python
- Pyrogram
- PyTgCalls
- FFmpeg
- MongoDB

Together they create a stable and fast streaming engine.

---

🌐 Supported Music Sources

Source| Supported
YouTube| ✔
Spotify| ✔
SoundCloud| ✔
Apple Music| ✔
Resso| ✔
Direct Audio Links| ✔

---

⚡ Installation

Clone the repository:

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

Move into project folder:

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

Install requirements:

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

---

🔑 Configuration

Rename the environment file:

sample.env → .env

Then add your credentials:

API_ID=your_api_id
API_HASH=your_api_hash
BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
OWNER_ID=your_telegram_id
LOGGER_ID=log_group_id
MONGO_URL=mongodb_url
SESSION=session_string

---

▶ Run The Bot

bash start

After starting, the bot will begin streaming music inside Telegram voice chats.

---

🎛 Commands

Command| Action
/play| Play music
/vplay| Play video
/pause| Pause playback
/resume| Resume playback
/skip| Skip current track
/stop| Stop music
/queue| Show playlist

📦 Installation

Clone the repository:

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

Move to project folder:

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

Install dependencies:

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

---

🔑 Configuration

Rename environment file:

sample.env → .env

Add your credentials:

API_ID=your_api_id
API_HASH=your_api_hash
BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
OWNER_ID=your_telegram_id
LOGGER_ID=log_group_id
MONGO_URL=mongodb_url
SESSION=session_string

---

▶ Run The Bot

bash start

After starting, the bot will begin streaming music inside Telegram voice chats.

Command| Function
/play| Play music
/vplay| Play video
/pause| Pause playback
/resume| Resume playback
/skip| Skip current track
/stop| Stop music

⚡ Installation Guide

1️⃣ Repository Clone Karo

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

2️⃣ Folder Me Jao

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

3️⃣ Dependencies Install Karo

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

---

🔑 Configuration

Environment file rename karo

sample.env → .env

Phir configuration me ye values bharo

API_ID=your_api_id
API_HASH=your_api_hash
BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
OWNER_ID=your_telegram_id
LOGGER_ID=log_group_id
MONGO_URL=mongodb_url
SESSION=session_string

---

🚀 Bot Start Karne Ka Tarika

bash start

Bot start hote hi Telegram voice chat me music play karega.

---

🎛 Commands

Command| Kaam
/play| Gaana play karo
/vplay| Video play karo
/pause| Music pause
/resume| Music resume
/skip| Next gaana
/stop| Music band
/queue| Playlist dikhao

</div>BIHAR KE BAHUBALI MUSIC BOT ek powerful Telegram bot hai jo Telegram voice chat me direct music aur video stream karta hai.

Matlab group me voice chat chalu karo aur bot se bolo:

/play song name

Aur turant music bajna shuru ho jayega.

Bot ko powerful banane ke liye use hua hai:

- Python
- Pyrogram
- PyTgCalls
- FFmpeg
- MongoDB

Isliye bot fast, stable aur powerful hai.
